hero.headline: Ask your data anything.
hero.subline: Agentic Text-to-SQL for Financial Services. We turn natural language questions into precise, SQL-backed answers — without losing the structure your data lives in.
hero.queryPlaceholder: What percentage of our mortgage portfolio has an LTV ratio above 80%?

problem.headline: Traditional RAG breaks when your data lives in tables.
problem.subline: Most AI tools flatten your structured data into unstructured text. That destroys the rows, columns, and relationships that make financial data meaningful.

example.label: Real-world example
example.question: "What percentage of Activision's games are still live?"
example.explanation: RAG linearizes the table, losing row context. The model guesses from fragments.

ragPoints: Tables are chunked into flat text
ourPoints: Tables stay in the database as structured data
Agent writes and executes real SQL
Every answer is traceable and auditable

solution.headline: Four steps from question to answer.
solution.subline: Our agentic framework combines semantic text retrieval with symbolic SQL execution — giving you the best of both worlds.

steps.title: Query Decomposition
steps.description: The system intelligently splits your natural language question into sub-queries — identifying which parts need document retrieval and which require SQL execution against structured data.

steps.title: Text Retrieval
steps.description: Semantic vector search over your documents, with reranking for precision. Relevant passages from PDFs, reports, and regulatory documents are surfaced and scored.

steps.title: SQL Execution
steps.description: The agent automatically generates and executes SQL against your relational database. Exact aggregations, joins, and calculations — no hallucinated numbers.

steps.title: Answer Synthesis
steps.description: SQL results and text context are cross-validated and composed into a coherent, cited answer. Every claim is grounded in either data or documents.

benchmarks.headline: Proven accuracy. Measured rigorously.
benchmarks.subline: Our approach, based on the TableRAG framework, outperforms NaiveRAG, ReAct, and TableGPT2 across all major hybrid QA benchmarks.
benchmarks.note: Scores are EM (Exact Match) accuracy on standard evaluation sets.

useCases.headline: Built for the complexity of financial data.
useCases.subline: From credit analysis to regulatory reporting — wherever structured and unstructured data intersect, we deliver precision.

cases.title: Automated Credit Analysis
cases.description: Turn financial statements into structured credit assessments. Our agent reads PDFs, extracts KPIs via SQL, runs calculations, and generates a comprehensive credit report.
cases.exampleQuery: What is Counterparty X's debt-to-equity ratio based on Q3 financial statements?

cases.title: Regulatory Reporting
cases.description: Query across regulatory documents and financial databases simultaneously. Get precise answers to compliance questions with full auditability and source tracing.
cases.exampleQuery: Which transactions in Q3 exceeded the threshold defined in MiFID II Article 26?

cases.title: Portfolio Analytics
cases.description: Ask natural language questions about portfolio performance, risk metrics, and allocation — backed by exact SQL calculations, not LLM approximations.
cases.exampleQuery: What is the Sharpe ratio of our tech allocation vs. the benchmark over the last 12 months?

demo.headline: Try it yourself.
demo.subline: See how a natural language question flows through our four-step agent pipeline.
demo.placeholder: Ask a question about your financial data...
suggestions: What percentage of loans in our portfolio have a debt-to-income ratio above 40%?
Compare the revenue growth of our top 5 clients over the last 3 quarters
Which counterparties exceed the large exposure limit under CRR Article 395?

team.headline: Built by people who speak both languages — code and finance.
team.narrative: We met at Capco, the capital markets consultancy. Niklas brought the algorithms, Sebastian brought the financial expertise. Together, we're building the bridge between AI and real-world finance.

founders.name: Niklas Hegemann
founders.title: Co-Founder & CTO
founders.tagline: From quantum algorithms to AI agents
founders.bio: Diplom-Physiker with 8+ years at the intersection of algorithm design and financial services. As Co-Founder of JoS QUANTUM, Niklas developed quantum and AI algorithms for risk assessment, portfolio optimization, and sensitivity analysis. Previously at Capco in Capital Markets consulting.

founders.name: Sebastian Schorsch
founders.title: Co-Founder & COO
founders.bio: Business economist with deep expertise in financial instruments (IFRS 9, HGB), ERP systems (SAP S/4HANA, MS Dynamics), and regulatory requirements. Career at KPMG, Capco, and as Head of Financial Operations at PPRO. Understands the pain points of finance teams firsthand.

cta.headline: Ready to unlock your financial data?
cta.subline: Join early-stage teams getting precise answers from complex financial datasets.
cta.socialProof: Backed by research. Built in Frankfurt.
